content.content:
I found an event that matches your request — it’s titled "Dentist Appointment" (id: 5) with description "Regular dental check-up" at Downtown Dental Clinic, currently scheduled 2024-05-18 09:00 — 2024-05-18 10:00 (1 hour).

Before I reschedule it to 2024-05-20 at 10:00 (I will keep the original 1-hour duration, so new end time would be 2024-05-20 11:00), I need one detail from you:

- Please confirm you want me to reschedule that event (Dentist Appointment, id 5) to 2024-05-20 10:00 — 11:00.
- Provide the clinic’s email address to notify them. I checked your contacts and inbox and couldn’t find an email address for Downtown Dental Clinic. If you don’t have the clinic email, tell me whether I should (a) notify only you, or (b) try another search (tell me any alternate clinic/contact name to try).

Once you confirm and provide the clinic email (or instruct how to proceed), I’ll add the clinic as a participant (so they get the event invite) and reschedule the event — both you and the clinic will be notified.
